title: Pretty Much Vanilla
description: A curated collection of Vanilla Plus mods and packs to enhance the Minecraft experience while staying true to the game's original feel!
body:
# **Pretty Much Vanilla**
Pretty Much Vanilla is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s visuals, mechanics, and quality-of-life features while staying true to the original game. 

## **What is Inside**

### ✨ Visual & Aesthetic Enhancements
- Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore & ModernFix – Optimize performance and boost FPS.
Continuity & Iris – Seamless glass textures and shader support for a stunning world.
- NotEnoughAnimations and Fresh Animations – Improved animations for a more lifelike experience.
- Falling Leaves & SnowyLeavesPlus – Immersive environmental details like drifting leaves.
- Legendary Tooltips & Detail Armor Bar – Improved UI elements with better item and armor displays.
- Presence Footsteps & Sound Physics Remastered – Enhanced sound design for deeper immersion.
- Mob Varients - Gives Mob varrients to the Illigers and Enderman as well as adds the new mob varents for the Cow, Pig, and Chicken
- Visual Tweaks - Visual Inhancments to certain minecraft entities without straying away for the vanilla style 
- Shaders - A massive visual enhancement for those who want it but is disabled by default
### 🔧 Gameplay & Mechanics Tweaks
- Right Click Harvest & Crops Love Rain – More intuitive farming mechanics.
- Better Mount HUD & Superb Steeds – Enhanced horse riding and mount UI.
- Potion Cauldron & EffectTimerPlus – More control over potion brewing and effect tracking.
- Friends & Foes + Beekeeper Hut – Expanded mob variety that fits seamlessly into vanilla.
- Dungeons and Taverns & YUNG’s Better Structures – More exciting world generation with improved dungeons, temples, and mineshafts.
### 🛠️ Quality-of-Life & Utility Mods
- Mod Menu & Cloth Config – Easy mod customization and management.
- Better Recipe Book & Chest Tracker – More intuitive crafting and inventory organization.
- Mouse Tweaks & Inventory Tweaks Renewed – Faster, smoother item handling.
- Cycle Paintings & Toggleable Item Frames – More flexibility in decorating.
- Easy Elytra Takeoff, Do a Barrel Roll, and Jump Over Fences – Improved movement without breaking balance.
### 🌍 The Perfect Balance for EVERYONE
- For Builders 🏗️ – Subtle aesthetic improvements with Bridging Mod, DisplayCase, and Better Carpets.
- For Explorers 🗺️ – More exciting structures and dungeons with YUNG’s Better Structures and Dungeons and Taverns.
- For Survivalists 🏹 – Refined mechanics like Better Enchanting Table, Void Totem
, and Trade Cycling.
- For Performance Seekers ⚡ – Lag-free gameplay with Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, ImmediatelyFast, and BadOptimizations.

Whether you’re a casual player or a seasoned adventurer, Pretty Much Vanilla Plus ensures a polished, optimized, and immersive Minecraft experience that feels just like home.



## **Extra Recommended Resource Packs and Mods**
- [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Packs](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) 
- [All Mob Heads ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/all-mob-heads)
- [Armor Stands Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armorstands-reimagined)
- [Better Illagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-illagers)
- [Sludgy Slimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sludgy-slimes)

- [Better Combat ](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
